transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, the 8th of November, 2013.
I just woke up. It's like 10.
Yesterday, I didn't work because it was kind of cold.
We weren't, or didn't have work.
But I spent all day trying to switch over to my phone from AT&T to Verizon
Because I can, I can, I spend 13 bucks less because it's bundled with my internet.
It could be a West.
And, yeah, it's just simple.
Yeah, same people.
And I was a little bit bummed with AT&T anyways.
Before, like a year ago, I was getting 3 gigabytes a month.
And all of a sudden, now I'm only getting 1 gigabyte a month and paying the same amount each month.
And Trevor, who came by and was hanging out with me, he uses AT&T.
He pays like 80 a month and gets like 4 gigs.
So I was like, all right, screw AT&T.
And they've done weird stuff in the past.
So, anyways, yeah, I'm going to pay 13 bucks less.
And then I get a new phone.
And then I can sell my old phone for 50 bucks back to Verizon.
But that took all day because they kept dropping my call.
And then, you know, I'd try to connect.
And then they couldn't connect me to the right people.
And then one lady told me I had to go back to manually with them,
Make sure that it was packaged together because I'd get the $10 discount.
And then I had to get shuffled around.
It just took for like 4 hours.
And then I went over and picked my friend up over to the airport.
Kind of like an assistant to him.
And then my mom wanted to take me over to see some lady talk about aliens.
But she wasn't really into it.
So we left and then watched Ender's Game over at the movies.
That was pretty good.
I liked Ender's Game.
Yeah.
Super smart.
And that was yesterday, man.
Kind of didn't do that much.
Today, I'm going to go help my mom.
And then I'm going to go with her over to check out a Macintosh computer.
And I'm going to clean the house today.
Organize and figure out the workings of the bank.
I have to get some direct deposits switched over and figure out the website and that kind of stuff.
Hopefully, I'll have time to go to the gym or something later on today.
So anyways, that was yesterday.
Oh, I forgot to vlog about it yesterday.
I got back last night and just spaced.
Just spaced in the vlog until I was already in bed.
And I was like, alright, whatever.
I guess I'll do it tomorrow morning.
So that's it.
Peace out.
